title: Homicides of Christine Banfield and Joseph Ryan

communications.subject: Virginia Freedom of Information Act Request: Homicides of Christine Banfield and Joseph Ryan
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Virginia Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

Any held by the Fairfax County Police Department relating to the homicides of Christine Banfield and Joseph Ryan. Records should include but are not limited to:

- Incident and offense reports
- Investigative reports, summaries, and case files
- Arrest warrants, affidavits, and charging documents
- Search warrants and returns
- Interview notes, recorded statements, and transcripts
- Forensic reports and lab results
- 911 calls and dispatch logs
- Crime scene photographs and video
- Any communications (including emails and internal correspondence) referencing Brendan Banfield and/or Juliana Peres Magalhaes in connection with this investigation

If portions of these records are exempt from disclosure, I request that you redact only the exempt portions and provide the remainder, as required by law. Please cite the specific statutory exemption(s) relied upon for any withheld material.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Tom Nash, a citizen of Virginia, in coordination with Nina Schutzman.
